name: Ashgate Runners
specialty: Expert navigators of the Undercity's labyrinthine Warrens, specializing in retrieval of rare artifacts and information

members.name: Vaelin Ashgate
members.note: A scarred veteran with a reputation for his unyielding resolve and uncanny sense of direction

members.name: Nyx Silverclaw
members.note: A lithe and agile cat-woman known for her keen eyesight and her penchant for disappearing acts

visual: Clad in leather and heavy boots, they move with practiced ease through the Undercity's grime. Vaelin wears a worn fur coat, while Nyx's fur is neatly trimmed and dyed a striking silver. Both carry a set of lockpicks, and Nyx's eyes glow an eerie gold in the dark.
reputation_note: The Ashgate Runners are a fearsome duo, known for their ability to find what others can't and their unwillingness to back down from a challenge
